prs.title: fix(readiness): recover from marketplace listing dedup races on update/discovery paths
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Fixes a race condition on two distinct paths (update + discovery) with dedicated dedup logic across two core files plus two focused test suites and minor Docker changes — solid bug fix with meaningful coverage.

prs.title: Merge main into staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Merge PR accumulating multiple feature branches (product-from-URL, company-name edit, marketplace scoping fix, Bedrock toolConfig fix, schema migration, e2e tests) across 17+ custom files; scored on net custom work not already counted in constituent PRs.

prs.title: feat: add product from AWS Marketplace URL + edit company name
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Full-stack feature spanning server actions, AWS Marketplace URL parsing, multiple UI components (AddProduct, EditCompanyName, Fundamentals), data loading, and e2e tests — significant breadth of new capability.

prs.title: fix(studio): Bedrock toolConfig on competitive-analysis finalize (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Targeted prod hotfix correcting Bedrock toolConfig structure in the competitive-analysis agent plus a matching unit test — modest but non-trivial AI agent fix.

prs.title: fix(readiness): scope Product.marketplaceListingId unique per company (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Scopes a Prisma unique constraint to company level, updates the collector to handle the new uniqueness, adds a migration, and a unit test — small schema + logic change with clear scope.

prs.title: fix(automation): enforce tenant isolation on automation actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Enforces tenant isolation across the automation control plane, agent, tools index, and two action files with a foundational unit test — meaningful security/correctness refactor touching multiple layers.

prs.title: fix(studio): enqueue BTS generation directly from assessment + strategy slides
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted fix wiring BTS generation enqueueing from two slide/node components — minimal logic change across only two files.

prs.title: Revert #475 (guided-experience UI / action-needed tray) out of staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Reverting a large feature (guided-experience UI + action-needed tray) cleanly across 17 files including components, layout, and sandbox pages requires careful coordination even though it is removal work.

prs.title: Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Establishes a full Terraform IaC foundation (44 files, 2462 lines) covering Cognito migration, bootstrap, env configs, CI/CD workflow integration, and supporting tooling — a major architectural infrastructure investment.

prs.title: Sm 565/guided experience UI
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: New guided-experience UI surface with 16 components (Tray, task cards, inline prompts, assignee selectors, CRM connect panel), sandbox pages, and AppShell integration — significant frontend feature build-out.

prs.title: Studio: move BTS & Competitive Analysis generation to background workers
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Architectural shift moving BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background workers via BullMQ, touching AI agents, generation entrypoints, schema migration, multiple slide components, studio actions, and hooks across 26 files.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line Dockerfile tweak to copy the docs directory into the runner image — trivial config fix.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Duplicate of #472 — same single-file, trivial Dockerfile docs-copy fix.

prs.title: Playbook editing + AI assistant guided flow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Large feature combining playbook editing UI, AI assistant guided flow, automation agent/tools updates, schema migrations, performance pages, admin pages, and substantial supporting docs/todos across 35 files.

prs.title: feat(ace): connect ACE opportunities to existing CRM deals (SM-545)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: End-to-end ACE opportunity-to-CRM-deal connection feature spanning a ConnectCrmCard UI, prospect editor integration, server actions, sandbox opportunity client, and ACE validation actions — substantial full-stack feature.

prs.title: feat(ace): refresh CRM contacts at ACE push time (SM-542)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds CRM contact refresh logic at ACE push time across HubSpot, Salesforce, and a shared hydration layer with a coordinating action — a solid, focused feature touching multiple integration surfaces.

prs.title: Clean up CRM stage mappings + LLM crosswalk gap-fill (SM-562)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces an LLM-powered gap-fill crosswalk for CRM value mappings alongside a seeding mechanism and updated UI/actions — meaningful architectural addition to the CRM mapping pipeline with AI involvement.

prs.title: feat(ace): submit-for-review + consolidated ACE review in prospect editor (SM-563)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A large, wide-ranging PR spanning 16 files and 1620 lines that adds a full ACE submit-for-review workflow, consolidated review UI, status banners, push queue updates, AWS connector deployment scripting, and core ACE mapper/validator logic — constituting a major feature with significant architectural footprint.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Integration & Data Integrity
stories.rationale: Enabled adding products via AWS Marketplace URL, scoped marketplace listing IDs uniquely per company, and fixed deduplication race conditions to ensure reliable marketplace data across the platform.

stories.name: ACE Partner Network & CRM Deal Connectivity
stories.rationale: Delivered end-to-end ACE opportunity management including submit-for-review flows, connecting ACE opportunities to existing CRM deals, refreshing CRM contacts at push time, and intelligently filling CRM stage mapping gaps with LLM crosswalk logic.

stories.name: AI Studio Background Processing & Reliability
stories.rationale: Moved BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background workers for better performance, enabled direct BTS enqueuing from assessment and strategy slides, and fixed a Bedrock toolConfig production issue in competitive analysis finalization.

stories.name: Playbook Editing with AI-Guided Flow
stories.rationale: Introduced a full playbook editing experience with an integrated AI assistant to guide users through structured business readiness workflows.

stories.name: Guided Experience UI Exploration & Rollback
stories.rationale: Shipped a guided experience UI with an action-needed tray, then reverted it from staging to address issues before re-releasing, reflecting an iterative approach to this onboarding feature.

stories.name: AWS Cognito Authentication Migration Foundation
stories.rationale: Established Terraform infrastructure-as-code foundations for migrating user authentication to AWS Cognito, enabling a more scalable and secure identity management layer.

stories.name: Multi-Tenant Automation Security Enforcement
stories.rationale: Fixed a critical tenant isolation gap in automation actions to ensure no cross-tenant data leakage during automated workflow execution.

stories.name: Staging Environment Sync
stories.rationale: Merged main branch changes into staging to keep the pre-production environment current with the latest production-ready work.

stories.name: Admin Documentation Availability Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed the Docker runner image to include the docs directory so that admin documentation loads correctly in deployed environments.
